case_title: GREGORY DIXON VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY SFMTA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $431.00 FILED BY DIXON, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY SFMTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JUN-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY SFMTA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GREGORY DIXON & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE, VIRGINIA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER AT SFMTA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIXON, GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY SFMTA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
